chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title

markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 9. Display of Plates, Tabs, and Stickers [5200 - 5206]
##### § 5206

Vehicles for which weight fees are paid on a partial year basis shall display a certificate or insignia issued by the department, which shall state the end of the period for which the vehicle is licensed.

*(Amended by Stats. 1981, Ch. 636, Sec. 4.)*

subsections.text: Vehicles for which weight fees are paid on a partial year basis shall display a certificate or insignia issued by the department, which shall state the end of the period for which the vehicle is licensed.
